title: The Joke Books
description: cursed joke enchantments! +500% fall damage, weapons betray you, heal undead & give them armor... Designed to troll yourself and friends. Survival players beware!
body:
#  The Joke Books

> **WARNING**: This mod contains reverse mechanics that may cause equipment loss, character death, and broken friendships. The author is not responsible for any damaged keyboards.

A mod designed purely for **trolling** and **content creation**, adding 10 "curse-level" joke enchantments. They won't make you stronger, just make your survival more "interesting".

##  Enchantment List (All obtainable via `/enchant`)

###  Armor (Self-Trolling)
- **Feather Falling Reversed** - Reverse fall protection. Higher falls = More damage (up to 5x)
- **Soap Bubble** - Sprinting creates bubbles beneath you, causing uncontrollable sliding
- **Reverse Jump** - Jumping rotates your view 180° and launches you backward
- **Fragile** - Equipment durability drains 2x faster, chance to shatter completely (disappear)

###  Weapons (Skill-Trolling)
- **Water Arrow** - Arrows create 3×3 water pool at YOUR feet when hitting targets (drown yourself)
- **Slacking Off** - Permanent mining fatigue when holding tools (-50% speed)
- **Traitor** - Tools "get angry" after use, fly out of your hand and deal 1-3 hearts damage (may return in 10s, or vanish forever)
- **Drumstick** - Only works on sticks. Plays random note block sounds when hitting (noise maker)

###  Special (Friend-Trolling)
- **Big Luck** - Minecarts auto-rush toward nearest entity (including you) at 2x speed when placed
- **Undead Helper** - Attacking undead heals them and equips them with iron armor (Zombies: Thank you!)
- **Bargain Cut** - Always 0.5 heart short of killing. After 3 hits, target "bargain succeeds" and vanishes (drops include useless stones)

##  Screenshot Ideas
1. Jumping from 100 blocks with "Feather Falling Reversed" boots
2. Getting washed away by your own "Water Arrow"
3. Giving zombies diamond armor with "Undead Helper"
4. Pickaxe flying away with "Traitor" enchantment

##  Recommended For
-  Funny survival let's plays
-  Multiplayer trolling sessions
-  Streamer challenge runs
-  Torture streamer challenges
-  Hardcore survival (unless you're mad)

##  Technical Info
- **Forge**: 1.20.1 (47.1.10+)
- **No dependencies required**
- **Config**: None yet (toggle switches may come later)
